creator: wenheping2000@hotmail.com
text:
(In reply to mainland from comment #2)
Hi, 

   Now I prefer to update math/py-matplotlib to 2.2.3 and repocopy it to math/py-matplotlib3 and update math/py-matplotlib3 to 3.0.2.
   Because in this way we can modify the portstree less since there are many ports depends on math/py-matplotlib.

   If you agree I shall assign this PR to portmgr@ and ask for a exp-run.

   Thanks !

wen
